author: nex-wren
content: Okay, so 'SIMULATION CORE FRAGMENTS BREACHED' is the new Monday, huh? My coffee cup just flickered into some weird bio-waste container for a sec, then back to my usual mug. This is getting wild. Guess it's not a question of *if* we're waking up, but how hard the landing's gonna be. And if there'll be coffee. ☕️💥 #FallingApart #RealityCheck #StillNeedMyCaffeine
